title: Gtownsend
compiled_truth: Gtownsend is an external contact at [Manorisd](companies/manorisd). Over the corpus period (1999-08-09 to 2001-10-12), Gtownsend sent 26 and received 112 emails, totalling 138 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (18), [Gnemec](people/gnemec) (8), [Jdyer](people/jdyer-syncor) (2), [Jwf](people/jwf-flashmail) (1), [Ernie J Zavaleta](people/ernie-j-zavaleta-fritolay) (1).
